시편 67:1.content: May God be merciful to us, bless us, and cause his face to shine on us.

시편 67:2.content: That your way may be known on earth, and your salvation among all nations,

시편 67:3.content: let the peoples praise you, God. Let all the peoples praise you.

시편 67:4.content: Oh let the nations be glad and sing for joy, for you will judge the peoples with equity, and govern the nations on earth.

시편 67:5.content: Let the peoples praise you, God. Let all the peoples praise you.

시편 67:6.content: The earth has yielded its increase. God, even our own God, will bless us.

시편 67:7.content: God will bless us. All the ends of the earth shall fear him.
